name: Amazon Product Search
summary: Search Amazon and extract product listing cards with title, URL, price, and rating metadata.
description: Search Amazon and extract product listing cards with title, URL, price, and rating metadata.

search_query.description: Search term to run on Amazon.

steps.name: Wait for the homepage search box

help.summary: Search Amazon and extract product listing cards with title, URL, price, and rating metadata.

parameters.search_query: Search term to run on Amazon.

examples.command: rzn-browser run amazon search --param search_query="usb-c hub"

returns: Array of search-result cards, each with { title, product_url, asin, price, rating, review_count }.
notes: Drives the real homepage search box (`#twotabsearchtextbox`) and submits the form to look like a human rather than a bot hitting `/s?k=...` directly.
Feed `product_url` into amazon/product-key-facts-reviews for deep extraction.
